signature.cause: Reproduction test missing or not properly validating fix
signature.behavior: Agent generates patch that applies cleanly with no reproduction test to verify it works; hidden test suite rejects it
signature.mechanism: Bootstrap role failed to create proper reproduction test or verification step didn't enforce test creation/validation

clusters.symptom: Patch applies cleanly, regression tests pass, but hidden grader says resolved=0; repro_excerpt empty

signature.cause: Fix does not address root cause; reproduction test explicitly fails
signature.behavior: Agent generates patch and reproduction test, but test still fails after applying patch; candidate 1 explicitly shows repro_pass=False
signature.mechanism: Agent misunderstood the issue or provided incomplete/incorrect solution; fix is syntactically valid but doesn't solve the problem

clusters.symptom: Reproduction test runs and fails with repro_pass=False; test output shows fix didn't work

signature.cause: Fix causes regression in existing test suite
signature.behavior: Patch applies and appears correct but breaks previously-passing tests (test_caplog_captures_for_all_stages); regression=0.88
signature.mechanism: Agent did not consider side effects or broader test suite impact when writing the fix

clusters.symptom: Fix breaks FAILED testing/logging/test_fixture.py::test_caplog_captures_for_all_stages; score=0.9438 due to regression
